# Vatsalya Children Care

> Pediatric clinic in Sola, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, led by Dr. Aashita A. Sinha
> (MBBS, MD Pediatrics) — a pediatrician, neonatologist, and certified lactation
> consultant. Care for children from birth through 18 years. Tagline: "Nurturing
> Smiles, Ensuring Health."

## Key facts

- Clinic: Vatsalya Children Care
- Doctor: Dr. Aashita A. Sinha — MBBS, MD Pediatrics; Neonatologist, Pediatrician and Lactation Consultant
- Specialisation: pediatrics, neonatology, and a dedicated breastfeeding/lactation support center
- Ages treated: birth through 18 years
- Location: 509, B-Wing, 5th Floor, Grace Business Park, Sangeet Cross Roads, Near Shaleen Hospital, Above Reliance SMART Bazaar, Kargil Petrol Pump Road, Sola, Ahmedabad, Gujarat – 380060, India (near Science City and the Gujarat High Court)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90160 39796
- Email: vatsalyachildrencare@gmail.com
- Booking: appointment-only, via WhatsApp or phone
- Map: https://www.google.com/maps?cid=9088339190125086181

## Services

- General Pediatric OPD (up to 18 years)
- Vaccination Clinic (IAP 2025 schedule)
- Newborn Care OPD (neonatology)
- Breastfeeding Clinic — antenatal & postnatal lactation support
- Well Baby Clinic
- Growth & Development Assessment
- Infant & Child Nutrition Program
- Teenage Health Clinic & Counselling Centre
- Teleconsultation for breastfeeding issues

## Why Vatsalya

Vatsalya Children Care combines fully credentialed pediatric care (MD Pediatrics,
neonatology) with genuine warmth, and is one of the few clinics in Sola, Ahmedabad
offering certified lactation-consultant support antenatally, postnatally, and via
teleconsultation.

## Pages

- Home: https://vatsalyachildrencare.in
